runners.formComment: Last start finished 6th on April 6 over 390m at Shepparton behind Our Regards beaten 9 lengths (22.84) in a Grade 4. Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 6th on April 6 over 390m at Shepparton behind Our Regards beaten 9 lengths (22.84) in a Grade 4. Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.

runners.formComment: Won over this track and trip. Last start finished 4th over 435m at Sale beaten 9 lengths (24.82) behind Ash Intention in a Grade 4/5 on April 5. Thereabouts at the last couple. Suited here and likely to run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won over this track and trip. Last start finished 4th over 435m at Sale beaten 9 lengths (24.82) behind Ash Intention in a Grade 4/5 on April 5. Thereabouts at the last couple. Suited here and likely to run well.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame latest (25.27) when seventh over 435m at Sale in a Grade 5. Has one win and three placings from six starts from the draw. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (25.27) when seventh over 435m at Sale in a Grade 5. Has one win and three placings from six starts from the draw. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lost ground turning into home straight and lost ground.
Quick to begin and raced wide entering back straight.

runners.formComment: Flew the lids with a quick early split but had to settle for the minor money when third (22.91) over 400m at this track. Comes out of a hot form race. Worth following up.

formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a quick early split but had to settle for the minor money when third (22.91) over 400m at this track. Comes out of a hot form race. Worth following up.

runners.formComment: Finished third at big odds last time (22.85) over 400m at this track. Awkward draw to overcome. Looking to others.

runners.formComment: Has finished fourth at the last two runs, both at Sale, the latest when beaten 5 lengths behind Paw Varna over 435m. Likely to find this a bit tough.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished fourth at the last two runs, both at Sale, the latest when beaten 5 lengths behind Paw Varna over 435m. Likely to find this a bit tough.

runners.formComment: Finished off last campaign with a second (26.18) in a GR 5 at Q Lakeside and returns after a four-and-a-half months break. Yet to win but has placed from two first-up runs. Looks one of the hopes in the race.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Commenced to give ground in the home straight.

runners.formComment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest at big odds finishing third (23.04) at this track. Jumps from the outside. Has ability and should run well.

runners.formComment: Has finished seventh at her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 400m. Has failed to show enough to come into contention.

runners.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fifth last time out over 350m at Healesville. Tempted to look elsewhere.
